title: 10 health benefits of Scrophularia nodosa (figwort)
intro: Scrophularia nodosa has health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving respiratory issues. Its medicinal properties include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and iridoid glycosides, which exhibit anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic activities. This can improve the quality of life for individuals suffering from bronchitis, asthma, and chronic coughs by relieving symptoms and reducing inflammation in the lungs.
